fields.name: nft
fields.label: Data NFT
fields.help: All metadata is stored on-chain in a newly deployed ERC-721 contract representing this asset, created with this name, symbol, description and image.

fields.name: description
fields.label: Description
fields.help: Add a thorough description with as much detail as possible. You can use [Markdown](https://daringfireball.net/projects/markdown/basics). You can change the description at any time. If you provide personal data, please note that it will remain in the transaction history.

fields.name: descriptionDirection
fields.label: Description language direction
fields.help: Please enter the description language direction

fields.name: descriptionLanguage
fields.label: Description language
fields.help: Please enter the description language

fields.name: license
fields.label: URL
fields.help: The license that governs how this dataset or its content can be used, shared, or modified. Examples include : https://file.com/license.json, MIT, Apache 2.0, or GPL licenses.

fields.name: additionalLicense
fields.label: URL
fields.help: A SPDX identifier of the license applicable to this service.

fields.name: accessTermsAndConditions
fields.title: URL
fields.label: Terms and Conditions
fields.help: The Terms and Conditions under which this service can be accessed. A resolvable link to the T&C document is expected. If no Terms are given the default [terms of this portal](https://portal.pontus-x.eu/terms) will be applied.

fields.name: dockerImage
fields.label: Docker Image
fields.help: Please select an image to run your algorithm.

fields.name: dockerImageCustom
fields.label: Custom Docker Image
fields.help: Provide the name and the tag of a public Docker hub image or the custom image if you have it hosted in a 3rd party repository

fields.name: dockerImageChecksum
fields.label: Docker Image Checksum
fields.help: Provide the checksum(DIGEST) of your docker image.

fields.name: dockerImageCustomEntrypoint
fields.label: Docker Image Entrypoint
fields.help: Provide the entrypoint for your algorithm.

fields.name: usesConsumerParameters
fields.label: Algorithm custom parameters
fields.help: Algorithm custom parameters are used to define required consumer input before running the algorithm in a Compute-to-Data environment.
options: This asset uses algorithm custom parameters

fields.name: dataController
fields.label: Data Controller
fields.help: The responsible data controller, as defined in the GDPR.

fields.name: legalBasis
fields.label: Legal Basis
fields.help: The legal basis for processing PII. Defined in GDPR.

fields.name: purpose
fields.label: Purposes
fields.help: The purpose of processing the contained PII. It is recommended to use [established vocabulary](https://w3c.github.io/dpv/dpv/#vocab-purpose).

fields.name: dataSubjectConsent
fields.label: Consent of data subjects
options: I confirm that I have the consent of data subjects/holders to publish this asset

fields.name: dataTokenOptions
fields.label: Datatoken
fields.help: The datatoken used for accessing this asset will be created with this name & symbol.

fields.name: providerUrl
fields.label: Provider URL
fields.help: Enter the URL for your custom [provider](https://github.com/oceanprotocol/provider/) or leave as is to use the default one. If you change your provider URL after adding your file, please add & validate your file again.

fields.title: URL
fields.label: File
fields.help: This URL will be stored encrypted after publishing. **Please make sure that the endpoint is accessible over the internet and is not protected by a firewall or by credentials.**
fields.computeHelp: For a compute dataset, your file should match the file type required by the algorithm, and should not exceed 1 GB in file size.

innerFields.title: Headers
innerFields.label: Headers
innerFields.help: This HEADERS will be stored encrypted after publishing.

fields.title: S3
fields.computeHelp: For a compute dataset, your file should match the file type required by the algorithm, and should not exceed 1 GB in file size.

innerFields.title: Endpoint
innerFields.label: Endpoint URL
innerFields.help: S3 endpoint URL (e.g., https://s3.amazonaws.com for AWS S3, or your custom S3-compatible endpoint)

innerFields.title: Region
innerFields.label: Region
innerFields.help: Region (e.g., us-east-1). Optional; defaults to us-east-1 if omitted. Ensure the input value contains no spaces, as some S3 providers cannot process them.

innerFields.title: Bucket
innerFields.label: Bucket Name
innerFields.help: S3 bucket name where the file is stored. Ensure the input value contains no spaces, as some S3 providers cannot process them

innerFields.title: Object Key
innerFields.label: Object Key/Path
innerFields.help: Object key (path within the bucket). Ensure the input value contains no spaces, as some S3 providers cannot process them

innerFields.title: Access Key ID
innerFields.label: Access Key ID
innerFields.help: Access key for the S3-compatible API

innerFields.title: Secret Access Key
innerFields.label: Secret Access Key
innerFields.help: Secret key for the S3-compatible API

innerFields.title: Force Path Style
innerFields.label: Force Path Style
innerFields.help: If true, use path-style addressing (e.g., endpoint/bucket/key). Required for some S3-compatible services (e.g., MinIO). Default false (virtual-host style, standard for AWS S3).

fields.title: IPFS
fields.label: CID
fields.help: This CID will be stored encrypted after publishing.
fields.computeHelp: For a compute dataset, your file should match the file type required by the algorithm, and should not exceed 1 GB in file size.

fields.title: Arweave
fields.label: Transaction ID
fields.help: This Transaction ID will be stored encrypted after publishing.
fields.computeHelp: For a compute dataset, your file should match the file type required by the algorithm, and should not exceed 1 GB in file size.

fields.title: Graphql
fields.label: URL
fields.help: This URL will be stored encrypted after publishing.
fields.computeHelp: For a compute dataset, your file should match the file type required by the algorithm, and should not exceed 1 GB in file size.

innerFields.title: Headers
innerFields.label: Headers
innerFields.help: This HEADERS will be stored encrypted after publishing.

innerFields.title: Query
innerFields.label: Query
innerFields.help: This QUERY will be stored encrypted after publishing.

fields.title: FTP/FTPS
fields.label: FTP/FTPS URL
fields.help: This FTP/FTPS URL will be stored encrypted after publishing. Supports ftp:// and ftps:// protocols. May include credentials in the URL.
fields.computeHelp: For a compute dataset, your file should match the file type required by the algorithm, and should not exceed 1 GB in file size.

fields.name: links
fields.label: Sample file
fields.help: This URL will be stored encrypted after publishing. Please make sure that the endpoint is accessible over the internet and is not protected by a firewall or by credentials.

fields.name: algorithmPrivacy
fields.label: Algorithm Privacy
options: Keep my algorithm private for Compute-to-Data
fields.help: By default, your algorithm can be downloaded for free or a fixed price, in addition to running in compute jobs. Enabling this option will prevent downloading, so your algorithm can only be run as part of a compute job on a dataset.

fields.name: access
fields.label: Access Type
fields.help: Choose how you want your files to be accessible for the specified price.
fields.disclaimer: Please do not provide downloadable personal data without the consent of the data subjects.

fields.name: publisherTrustedAlgorithms
fields.label: Selected Algorithms
fields.help: Choose one or multiple algorithms you trust to allow them to run on this dataset.

fields.name: allowAllPublishedAlgorithms
fields.label: Allow Algorithms
fields.help: Choose how to allow algorithms to run on this dataset.

fields.name: publisherTrustedAlgorithmPublishers
fields.label: Allow Trusted Algorithm Publishers
fields.help: You can optionally specify the wallet addresses of trusted publishers. Only algorithms published by these addresses will be allowed to run.

fields.name: publisherTrustedAlgorithmPublishersAddresses
fields.label: Publisher Addresses
fields.help: Enter the wallet addresses of trusted algorithm publishers.

fields.name: timeout
fields.label: Timeout
fields.help: Define how long buyers should be able to download the dataset again after the initial purchase.

fields.name: usesConsumerParameters
fields.label: User defined parameters
fields.help: User defined parameters are used to filter or query the published asset.
options: This asset uses user defined parameters

fields.name: name
fields.label: Service Name
fields.help: Please enter the service name

fields.name: description
fields.label: Service description
fields.help: Please enter the service description

fields.name: direction
fields.label: Service language direction
fields.help: Please enter the service language direction

fields.name: language
fields.label: Service language
fields.help: Please enter the service language

additionalDdos.title: Additional Asset Descriptions
additionalDdos.help: Additional Asset Descriptions are used to provide additional information about the asset. They are displayed in the asset description section.

fields.name: additionalCredential
fields.label: Content
fields.help: Insert an additional description

fields.name: ddoType
fields.label: Type
fields.help: Insert the ddo's type

fields.name: allow
fields.label: Allow ETH Address
fields.help: Web3 wallet addresses are used to control access to registered assets. Indicate specific wallet addresses to allow access to the asset, or allow access to all wallets by clicking "add all".

fields.name: deny
fields.label: Deny ETH Address
fields.help: Web3 wallet addresses are used to control access to registered assets. Indicate specific wallet addresses to deny access to the asset, or deny access to all wallets by clicking "add all".

fields.name: dummy content, actual content is defined under 'create' key in ../price.json
